checks.name: 5 allowed action methods implemented
checks.description: log_inspection, log_proposal, log_explanation, log_reconciliation, log_improvement — matching AI_ASSISTANCE_GOVERNANCE_CONTRACT.md §4

checks.name: ai_suggestion object production with type validation
checks.description: log_suggestion validates against 7 ALLOWED_SUGGESTION_TYPES, outputs PROPOSED status, confidence 0.0-1.0

checks.name: ai_detected_gap object production with type validation
checks.description: log_detected_gap validates against 5 ALLOWED_GAP_TYPES, outputs IDENTIFIED status

checks.name: L3 authority ceiling enforced
checks.description: All events carry authority_ceiling: L3 — hardcoded, not configurable

checks.name: replay-safe logging per §6
checks.description: model_id, temperature (0), prompt_hash (SHA256), deterministic_inputs logged on every event

checks.name: append-only JSONL persistence
checks.description: ai_assistance_events.jsonl — one JSON object per line, append-only writes

checks.name: emit_ai_intervention added to ChronicleEmitter
checks.description: Emits ai_intervention event, maps phase to semantic phase, tracks ai_interventions_logged counter

checks.name: emit_operator_decision added to ChronicleEmitter
checks.description: Emits operator_decision event at TENSION semantic phase, tracks operator_decisions_recorded counter

checks.name: pipeline _ai_logger initialization with graceful degradation
checks.description: _ai_logger global initialized in _init_chronicle with try/except, pipeline unchanged if unavailable

checks.name: Phase 3b AI assistance hook
checks.description: SDC execution logs PROPOSAL event and emits ai_intervention chronicle event

checks.name: Phase 3.7 hero moment AI assistance hook
checks.description: Hero moment candidate surfacing logs INSPECTION event and emits ai_intervention chronicle event

checks.name: invalid type rejection
checks.description: ValueError raised for invalid event_type, suggestion_type, gap_type, and decision values

checks.name: requires_operator_decision on all events
checks.description: All ai_assistance_event objects carry requires_operator_decision: true per contract §2

checks.name: no forbidden actions implemented
checks.description: Logger has no methods for mutation (F01-F12). Cannot promote, cannot mutate CSR, cannot change S-level, cannot accept/reject propositions

checks.name: object schemas match contract §3.1-§3.6
checks.description: All 4 object types (ai_assistance_event, ai_suggestion, ai_detected_gap, operator_decision_event) match contract field definitions
